expectations.text: Output contains all 6 rounds (Round 1 through Round 6)
expectations.evidence: No round-based debate. Structured as pros/cons analysis with recommendation.

expectations.text: Optimizer, Frontline Operator, and COO personas all appear and are distinct
Every challenge in Round 2 has a severity rating (critical/significant/minor)
Round 4 references specific mitigations from Round 3, not just repeating Round 2
Round 6 contains one of the 5 valid recommendations
expectations.evidence: Recommendation is 'Hybrid approach' — not one of the 5 valid options.

expectations.text: A CEO Summary section exists that is standalone and uses business language
Metrics table present with all 8 metrics filled in
People impact summary with headcount changes, roles affected, transition support, attrition risk
expectations.evidence: Risk table mentions retention but no structured people impact summary.

expectations.text: Round 5 includes fallback plans for surviving challenges
